---
name: "🐛 A notebook doesn't run"
about: A cell errors, or you get an unexpected result
title: "[bug] <notebook name>: <short description>"
labels: bug
---

**Which notebook?**
e.g. `03_supervised_trees_rf_shap.ipynb`, cell number if you know it.

**What happened?**
Paste the error message (the last few lines are usually enough).

**What did you expect?**
e.g. "the 'you should see' note said accuracy ~0.98".

**Your setup**
- How you're running it: [ ] local Jupyter · [ ] Colab · [ ] Binder
- OS: [Windows / macOS / Linux]
- Python version (`python --version`):
- Did you run the **set-up cell** at the top first? [ ] yes

**Tried already?**
- [ ] Kernel → Restart & Run All
- [ ] Re-installed requirements (`pip install -r requirements.txt`)
